info.title: Mainspring API
info.description: Multi-tenant API for watch, shoe, and auto-key repair shops. Handles customers, jobs, quotes, approvals, invoices, and billing.

get.description: Diagnostic: demo tenant state and B2B account count. No auth required.
Readiness: checks DB connectivity. Returns 503 if DB is unreachable.

post.description:
Force-create/update the testing tenant from env vars. Use when login fails with 'Invalid credentials'.
Enable with ALLOW_ENSURE_TESTING_TENANT=true or when APP_ENV is not production.

get.description: Returns a JSON snapshot of the tenant's data (customers, watches, jobs, quotes, invoices) for backup or portability.

get.summary: List known sessions for current user
get.description:
Return the currently authenticated session shape.
Until refresh-token persistence is introduced, we can only reliably surface
the active token context rather than a full device/session inventory.

post.summary: Revoke all other sessions for current user
post.description:
Refresh tokens are not persisted yet, so there are currently no server-tracked
"other sessions" to revoke. Returning a deterministic result avoids a silent stub.

post.summary: Create Public Auto Key Invoice Checkout
post.description: Start Stripe Checkout for a Mobile Services invoice (customer pays online).
Return all active jobs for a customer by email address (cross-tenant, public).
Create a 30-day bookmarkable portal session for the given email.

get.description: Return jobs for a portal session token (same as customer-lookup but token-auth).

post.description:
Accept a lead from your public website (e.g. Mister Minit key checker). Requires configured parent account + routes.

Header: ``X-Mobile-Lead-Secret``: shared secret (set in Parent account → Website lead feed).

post.description:
Issue a platform_admin-scoped token for any tenant, allowing the admin to
view and manage that shop's data as if they were the owner.

schema.title: Response List Platform Activity V1 Platform Admin Activity Get

get.description: All category groups (id + label).

Searchable flat list of all catalogue items.

Optionally filter by *group* id and/or fuzzy-search the item *name*.
Single catalogue item by its key.
All combo discount rules.
Guarantee text for shoe repairs.
All repair category groups (id + label).
Catalogue config including combos for price calculation.
Searchable flat list of catalogue items.
Single catalogue item by key.
All mechanical movements with purchase cost. Used for cost + margin when updating jobs.
Return quoted price in cents. RRP = max(minimum_rrp_cents, cost * (1 + margin/100)).

get.description: Count of stored prospects by category. Run scripts/collect_prospects to populate.
States and suburbs for prospect search filters. Suburbs from DB (public data), fallback to curated list if empty.
Look up vehicle details by registration plate and state. Proxies to Blue Flag NEVDIS.

schema.description: Registration state (ACT, NSW, NT, QLD, SA, TAS, VIC, WA)

get.description: Rank Vehicle_Systems rows for workshop ticket auto-fill (Mobile Services).
Return AKL complexity, known issues, tool recommendations, and cutting profiles for a vehicle.

post.description:
Reorder middle stops using Google Directions `optimize:true` waypoints.
First stop (earliest appointment) and last stop (latest) stay fixed — typical same-day run.

get.description: List custom services for the tenant. Returns catalogue-item-shaped dicts.

get.description: Full tool groups + scenarios (read-only).

JobNotePayload.title: JobNotePayload
JobNotePayload.description: Lightweight payload for adding a free-text note without changing status.

OptimizeDrivingRouteBody.title: OptimizeDrivingRouteBody
OptimizeDrivingRouteBody.description: Stops in appointment-time order. First and last stay fixed; middle stops are reordered for shorter driving.
